data.title: JPMorgan to Accept Bitcoin and Ethereum as Collateral for Institutional Clients
data.description: According to BlockBeats, JPMorgan Chase has announced that it will permit institutional clients to use Bitcoin and Ethereum as collateral. This move marks a significant step in integrating cryptocurrencies into traditional financial systems. The decision aligns with the growing acceptance of digital assets in mainstream finance, providing clients with more flexibility in managing their portfolios.

data.title: Whales Withdraw 1,470 BTC Worth $163 Million from Binance in One Hour
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale address bc1q8e withdrew 1,470 BTC from Binance in the past hour, worth approximately US$163 million.

data.title: Silver and Gold Prices Experience Significant Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, spot silver prices fell over 2% during the day, currently trading at $47.91 per ounce. Meanwhile, spot gold prices dropped below $4050 per ounce, retreating more than $90 from the day's high, with the daily decline expanding to 1.8%.

data.title: A trader with a 100% win rate opened a new BTC long position, with a holding value of approximately $8.9 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai Yi @ai_9684xtpa, a trader with a 100% win rate opened a new long BTC position, currently holding 80.3 BTC, valued at approximately $8.9 million, at an opening price of $110,900. The trader also held a long position of 33,270.78 ETH, valued at approximately $132 million, at an opening price of $3,897.59.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 1,130 USDT with a 1.93% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 24, 2025, 09:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,130 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,130.199951 USDT, with a narrowed 1.93% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Create a new wallet and deposit $2.125 million into Hyperliquid and open a 7x ENA long position
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a newly created wallet deposited $2.125 million USDC into Hyperliquid and opened a long position in ENA with 7x leverage. The account currently has a TWAP pending order set to further increase its holdings.

data.title: Binance Completes HEMI Network Integration and Opens Deposits
data.description: Binance has officially announced that it has integrated Hemi (HEMI) into the HEMI Network and is now open for deposits. Withdrawals will be available after sufficient deposits are made and will not be announced further. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: Pieverse Completes US$7 Million Strategic Funding Round Led by Animoca Brands and UOB Ventures
data.description: Pieverse, a Web3 payments and compliance infrastructure startup, announced the completion of a $7 million strategic funding round led by Animoca Brands and UOB Ventures, with participation from 10K Ventures, Signum Capital, Morningstar Ventures, Serafund, Undefined Labs, and Sonic Foundation. Pieverse stated that this round of funding will be used to strengthen its compliant payment infrastructure, advance the development of verifiable on-chain financial instruments, and enhance the transparency and compliance of Web3 payments. The company, backed by the Binance MVB Season 9 project, aims to standardize on-chain verifiable invoices, receipts, and bills through smart contract compatibility with multiple chains, thereby making blockchain payments auditable and regulatory-friendly. Pieverse co-founder and CEO Colin Ho stated that Pieverse aims to achieve the same level of clarity and compliance standards for on-chain transactions as traditional finance. This funding will support the expansion of enterprise-level compliance capabilities, global team building, and accelerate multi-chain integration. (chainwire)

data.title: LBank has launched SANTA and PAYAI
data.description: According to official news, LBank will launch SANTA by Virtuals (SANTA) and PayAI Network (PAYAI) on October 24, 2025, at 3:50 PM (SGT). Trading pairs for SANTA/USDT and PAYAI/USDT will also be available. Deposits are now open, and withdrawals will be available at 4:00 PM (SGT) on October 25.

data.title: Jupiter will launch a new ICO platform in November, with the first token issuance scheduled for mid-month.
data.description: In an interview with The Rollup, Jupiter co-founder Cash stated that the team is preparing to launch a new ICO platform, expected to launch in November 2025. The platform, whose name has not yet been announced, aims to provide issuance support for projects and provide more profit opportunities for JUP holders. Cash stated that the first token issuance is scheduled to begin in mid-November.

data.title: Trader Opens New Bitcoin and Ethereum Positions with Significant Holdings
data.description: According to Foresight News, a trader with a reported 100% success rate has recently opened a new long position in Bitcoin (BTC). The trader currently holds 80.3 BTC, valued at $8.9 million, with an entry price of $110,900 per Bitcoin. Additionally, the trader has a long position in Ethereum (ETH), holding 33,270.78 ETH, valued at $132 million, with an entry price of $3,897.59 per Ethereum.

data.title: Trump’s CZ pardon draws fury from Maxine Waters over ‘pay-to-play’ crypto ties
data.description:
Representative Maxine Waters slammed President Donald Trump’s pardon of Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao, calling it a corrupt favor to a “crypto criminal. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-accused-of-rewarding-crypto-criminals-after-pardoning-binance-s-cz?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_rnd%3Ddnw8z7%26r%3Ddnw8z7&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
